sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10557" key="a)ntisuriggiako/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντισῡριγγιακός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n10557.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">protecting against fistula,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">κολλύριον</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg015:13" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">15.13</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
